description.en: A beloved traditional tea house in a restored hanok where you remove shoes and sit on the floor for an authentic tea ceremony. Serves beautiful pastel-colored Korean rice cake snacks with honey dip and traditional teas.
description.ko: 복원된 한옥에서 신발을 벗고 바닥에 앉아 전통 다도를 체험하는 곳. 파스텔 컬러 한국 떡과 꿀 딥, 전통차를 제공.

tips: Must remove shoes — wear clean socks
Try the rice cake snacks with honey dip
Instagram-worthy traditional setting

description.en: The highest-rated hanok cafe in Gyeongju with a 4.4 Naver rating and thousands of reviews. Located on Bomun Lake with a stunning courtyard entrance featuring a lily pond and bridge. Large windows fill the main hall with natural light.
description.ko: 네이버 4.4 평점의 경주 최고 한옥 카페. 보문호수에 위치하며 연못과 다리가 있는 멋진 안마당. 대형 창으로 자연광이 가득한 본관.

best_times.en: Weekday afternoon to avoid weekend crowds

tips: Cross the lily pond bridge at the entrance for photos
Large windows make any seat a good seat
Combine with Bomun Lake cycling

description.en: A true hidden gem serving some of the best hanwoo (Korean beef) galbi in Gyeongju. So local it's not even on Google Maps — beloved by residents for charcoal-grilled premium beef at reasonable prices.
description.ko: 경주 최고의 한우 갈비를 제공하는 진정한 숨은 맛집. 구글맵에도 없을 정도로 로컬. 합리적 가격의 숯불 한우 갈비로 현지인에게 사랑받는 곳.

tips: Not on Google Maps — ask locals for directions
Charcoal-grilled hanwoo galbi is the must-order
Cash only

description.en: A hidden vegetarian cafe that opens only for a few hours a day. Known to insiders for its Korean vegetarian cuisine including shiraejeon (savory pancake). Lunch-only makes it a coveted spot.
description.ko: 하루 몇 시간만 영업하는 숨은 채식 카페. 시래전 등 한국 채식 요리로 아는 사람만 아는 곳. 점심 한정 영업으로 더 귀한 맛집.

tips: Opens only for lunch — arrive early
Try the shiraejeon (savory radish leaf pancake)
Very limited hours — check before visiting

description.en: Gyeongju's trendiest neighborhood of renovated hanoks turned into cafes, boutiques, and restaurants. A walkable strip near Daereungwon where traditional architecture meets modern Korean cool.
description.ko: 한옥을 리모델링한 카페, 부티크, 레스토랑이 모인 경주의 트렌디한 거리. 대릉원 근처의 도보 거리로 전통과 현대가 공존.

tips: Each hanok shop has unique character
Great for original souvenirs
Walk to Daereungwon (Royal Tombs) nearby

description.en: Featured on multiple Korean TV food shows including Baek Jongwon's 3 Great Kings. Famous for its unique dry-style jjamppong — stir-fried with pork and octopus instead of soupy. Lunch only, sells out fast.
description.ko: 백종원 3대천왕 등 다수 방송 출연. 국물 없이 볶는 독특한 짬뽕이 유명. 돼지고기와 낙지를 넣고 빨갛게 볶아냄. 점심만 영업, 조기 마감.

best_times.en: 11:30 AM sharp — sells out by 2 PM

tips: Arrive at opening or risk it selling out
The jjamppong here is stir-fried, not soupy
Cash only, very no-frills interior

description.en: A scenic 16km paved cycling circuit around Bomun Lake passing cherry blossom lanes, art installations, and the Gyeongju World Culture Expo Park. Bike rentals available for 5,000-10,000 won.
description.ko: 보문호수를 도는 16km 포장 자전거 도로. 벚꽃길, 예술 설치물, 경주세계문화엑스포공원을 지남. 자전거 대여 5,000-10,000원.

best_times.en: Spring (April) for cherry blossoms, Fall (Oct) for foliage

tips: Rent tandem bikes for couples (10,000 won/3hrs)
Single bikes are 5,000 won for 3 hours
Duck boat rentals also available on the lake

description.en: Korea's largest traditional village with 160+ hanok houses where people still live, preserving 500-year-old traditions. A UNESCO World Heritage Site with an authentic, peaceful charm far from tourist crowds.
description.ko: 160채 이상의 한옥이 있는 한국 최대 전통마을. 500년 전통을 지키며 실제 거주. 유네스코 세계문화유산으로 관광객 없는 평화로운 분위기.

tips: People still live here — be respectful and quiet
Much less touristy than Gyochon Village
Bus from downtown (₩1,800) or taxi

description.en: An architectural gem just outside Gyeongju featuring stepping stones across a reflection pool leading to a massive hinged door. White adobe walls blend with traditional hanok open trestle beams.
description.ko: 경주 외곽의 건축 명소 카페. 반영 풀 위의 징검다리와 거대한 여닫이문이 특징. 하얀 어도비 벽과 전통 한옥 개방 보의 조화.

best_times.en: Afternoon for best light on the reflection pool
best_times.ko: 오후가 반영 풀 채광이 가장 좋음

tips: The stepping stone entrance is the most photographed spot
Unique fusion of Korean and Mediterranean architecture
Worth the short drive from downtown

description.en: A traditional hanok village in southern Gyeongju where some families still reside. Beautifully preserved architecture with restaurants and cafes tucked into historic buildings. Less commercialized than Hwangridan-gil.
description.ko: 경주 남부의 전통 한옥마을. 일부 가족이 여전히 거주. 아름답게 보존된 건축물에 레스토랑과 카페가 자리. 황리단길보다 덜 상업적.

best_times.en: Morning or late afternoon for soft light
best_times.ko: 아침 또는 늦은 오후 부드러운 빛

tips: Some residents still live here — respect their privacy
Beautiful cafes hidden in hanok buildings
Walking distance to Cheomseongdae Observatory

description.en: A 50-year-old meat restaurant where they slice pork to your preferred thickness — thin, medium, or thick — right when you order. Famous for incredibly fresh samgyeopsal and moksal.
description.ko: 50년 전통의 정육식당. 주문 시 삼겹살과 목살을 원하는 두께로 썰어줌. 신선한 고기 맛으로 유명한 경주 현지인 맛집.

tips: Choose your pork thickness: thin, medium, or thick
Meat is sliced fresh when you order
50 years of tradition — truly local

description.en: A popular Hwangridan-gil cafe famous for its Daereungwon Tart — a dessert inspired by Gyeongju's royal tomb mounds. Second floor has floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the hanok rooftops of Hwangridan-gil.
description.ko: 황리단길의 인기 카페. 경주 대릉원 고분을 모티브로 만든 대릉원 타르트가 유명. 2층 통유리로 황리단길 한옥 지붕 뷰 감상.

tips: Must try the Daereungwon Tart — shaped like the royal tombs
Second floor window seats have the best view
Great photo spot of hanok rooftops

description.en: A modern buckwheat noodle restaurant opposite Bunhwangsa Temple. Clean, minimalist space serving cold buckwheat noodles and boiled pork in broth made with hanwoo bone and 10+ ingredients.
description.ko: 분황사 앞의 모던한 메밀막국수 전문점. 한우사골과 10여 가지 재료로 우려낸 육수에 메밀막국수와 수육을 제공. 깔끔한 공간.

tips: The broth is made with 10+ ingredients including hanwoo bone
Perfect summer lunch — cold buckwheat noodles
Great value for quality

description.en: A unique soba restaurant set in a hanok building, creating a fascinating Korean-Japanese fusion atmosphere. The maze-like interior adds to the charm. Handmade soba noodles served in traditional style.
description.ko: 한옥에서 일본식 소바를 즐기는 독특한 퓨전 레스토랑. 미로 같은 내부 구조가 매력적. 전통 방식의 수제 소바를 제공.

tips: The hanok setting makes soba feel uniquely Korean
Navigate the maze-like interior — each room feels different
Popular on weekends — go early or weekday

description.en: A cash-only local canteen at Taejongro 32 known to taxi drivers and construction workers. Serving hearty jeyuk bokkeum (spicy pork) set meals and cheonggukjang (fermented bean paste stew) since the old days.
description.ko: 택시기사와 공사 관계자의 단골집. 태종로 32에 위치. 제육볶음 정식과 청국장을 제공하는 현금 전용 현지인 식당.

tips: Cash only
Taxi driver and construction worker hangout — authentic as it gets
Jeyuk bokkeum set meal is the go-to order

description.en: A must-visit hanok cafe on Hwangridan-gil with a unique front yard where you can sit on the floor and enjoy coffee. Multiple hanok spaces each with a different feel, from cozy to open-air.
description.ko: 황리단길의 한옥 카페. 마당에 앉아 커피를 즐길 수 있는 독특한 공간. 여러 한옥 공간이 각각 다른 분위기를 연출.

tips: Sit in the courtyard on nice days
Each room has a different vibe — explore them all
Good coffee quality, not just atmosphere
